subject: URGENT: Production server is down
reason: The email is marked as urgent and mentions an immediate fix is needed due to customer impact.
draft_reply: We are aware of the production server issue and are working on an immediate fix. We will notify you as soon as the problem is resolved.

subject: Following up on last week's proposal
reason: The sender is checking in on a previously sent proposal, requesting an update.
draft_reply: Thank you for following up on the proposal. We will review it and get back to you shortly.

subject: You've won a $500 gift card!
reason: The email contains a suspicious link and a generic prize claim message.
draft_reply: We do not respond to unsolicited emails. Please disregard this message.

subject: Team lunch this Friday?
reason: This email is an informal invitation and does not require immediate action.
draft_reply: I'd be happy to join the team lunch this Friday. Please let me know if there are any other details to discuss.

subject: Invoice #4521 overdue - payment required
reason: Overdue invoice reminder with a clear request for payment
draft_reply: Dear billing@supplier.com, We appreciate your reminder about the overdue invoice #4521. We will review our payment records and settle the outstanding amount as soon as possible.

subject: Monthly newsletter - March 2026
reason: The email is a routine newsletter with no pressing or urgent information.
draft_reply: Thank you for sending the monthly newsletter. We appreciate the updates from your team.

subject: Interview scheduled for Monday 10am
reason: The email confirms an upcoming interview, requiring a timely response to acknowledge receipt of the information.
draft_reply: Thank you for confirming the interview details. I will make sure to be prepared for the technical interview on Monday at 10am PST.

subject: Bug report: login page broken on mobile
reason: The email requires a follow-up action from the sender to investigate and resolve the issue.
draft_reply: Thank you for reaching out about the issue with the login page on iOS Safari. We will investigate this matter further and provide a solution as soon as possible.

subject: Client contract needs signature by EOD
reason: The email explicitly states that the deal falls through if the contract is not signed by EOD, indicating a high level of urgency.
draft_reply: Dear CEO, I have escalated the matter and will ensure the contract is signed by EOD. Please confirm receipt of this email.
